name: tech-saas
style: Clean minimal tech illustration with flat vectors, soft drop shadows, and generous whitespace. Modern SaaS aesthetic with subtle gradients and glassmorphism accents.
typography: Bold geometric sans-serif with generous letter spacing. Headers in primary blue, body text in dark slate.
lighting: Bright diffused studio lighting with soft even illumination. No harsh shadows. Clean, professional, trustworthy.
mood: Professional, trustworthy, modern, approachable. Conveys competence without coldness.
